---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve Stepbot!
title: Stepbot Issue
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug, Issue, or problem.**
A clear and concise statement of what the bug, Issue or Problem is.

**Full Detail**
Exactly what happened and where/when.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Questions**
Please complete the following questions:
 - OS: [e.g. iOS]
 - Version Found On: [e.g. 1.0]
 - (If Known) Versions the issue is on: [e.g. 1.5 to 1.2]
 - (If found during as part of a project) Part Of Project: [e.g. 2.0 Alpha Testing}

**Additional context**
Add any other context or information you wish to share.
